$comment: Registry of upstream data sources for the 12-0 data pipeline (scripts/data/). stats.nba.com is IP-blocked in this sandbox/CI (returns 000), so live nba_api is an OPTIONAL local-only refresh; the GitHub-raw datasets below are the primary, reproducible inputs. The owner accepted Basketball-Reference-derived history (the only comprehensive pre-1996 source) for this non-commercial fan game. See docs/data-strategy.md.

sources.title: 2K-style rated player attributes (all-time + current)
sources.license: owner-provided dataset; accepted for this non-commercial fan game
sources.attribution: Hand-rated 2K-style attribute set supplied by the project owner.
sources.coverage: ~780 unique players (461 all-time + 457 current rows, deduped)
sources.notes: RATING SOURCE OF TRUTH. Per-player 0-99 attribute groups (outside/inside scoring, athleticism, playmaking, defense, rebounding), shot/pass/help-defense IQ, intangibles, overall_durability, height_feet, wingspan_feet, position, and an `archetype` string. Mapped to the 9 categories in scripts/data/twok.ts and joined to the box-score roster by normName + data-source/curated/player-aliases.json. Players it doesn't cover fall back to box-score formulas and are OVR-capped. No franchise/decade history (only a current/iconic team) — buckets come from the box-score join.

sources.title: TheNBACSV / nbaNew.csv (Basketball-Reference-derived season stats)
sources.license: unlicensed source data; owner-accepted for a non-commercial fan game (BR/Sportradar provenance)
sources.attribution: Historical stats via Basketball-Reference (data redistributed in peasant98/TheNBACSV).
sources.notes: 24.6k player-seasons, 3.9k players, all historical team codes (MNL, SYR, PHW, FTW, ROC...). Columns: SeasonStart, PlayerName, Pos, Age, Tm, G, MP, PER, TS%, USG%, AST%, TRB%, STL%, BLK%, BPM, WS, VORP, plus full box totals (FG..PTS). Tm='TOT' rows are season totals for traded players and must be excluded from franchise buckets.

sources.title: Brescou/NBA-dataset-stats-player-team
sources.notes: Carries real NBA PLAYER_ID/PERSON_ID (= headshot CDN id), TEAM_ABBREVIATION, AGE, per-game traditional + advanced + defense + usage, regular season and playoffs. player_index adds HEIGHT, POSITION, DRAFT_YEAR, FROM_YEAR/TO_YEAR. Used to extend coverage to 2023, supply modern advanced/defense detail, real heights, and headshot ids.

sources.title: FiveThirtyEight RAPTOR
sources.notes: Optional cross-check signal (RAPTOR, WAR) for modern ratings; not required to build the shipped dataset.

sources.title: NBA player headshots CDN
sources.notes: Reachable from sandbox (200). We store the URL + a verified/fallback flag, never the binary. playerId comes from the Brescou PLAYER_ID join.

sources.title: nba_api (stats.nba.com client)
sources.notes: stats.nba.com is blocked in this sandbox/CI. Run a local refresh only on a machine with network access, then commit the cached output so CI stays reproducible.
